workflows.name: Auto-acknowledge a new ticket
workflows.description: Emails the requester the moment their ticket lands, so nobody is left wondering whether it arrived.

workflows.name: Flag tickets that say "urgent"
workflows.description: When a new ticket has "urgent" in its subject, drop an internal note so the desk gives it a second look. A simple example of a condition driving an action.
workflows.actions: [{"type":"add_ticket_note","args":{"ticket_id":"{{ticket.id}}","note":"The requester used the word \"urgent\" in the subject — worth a quick triage to confirm the priority is right."}}]

workflows.name: Broadcast a status-page incident to the team
workflows.description: When you open an incident on the status page, push it straight into your team chat so internal staff hear it at the same time as customers. Ships OFF — add your chat webhook URL and switch it on.

workflows.name: Log every ticket that is binned
workflows.description: Writes an execution-log entry for every deletion, naming the ticket — a quiet, permanent record that answers "what happened to it?" months later.
